output_debit_classifier.reason: This is a standard inventory purchase on credit. The business acquires inventory (an asset) valued at $300 and incurs a corresponding obligation to pay the supplier (accounts payable, a liability). The term 'on account' is a conventional accounting term meaning the purchase is made on credit, creating a trade payable. Under IFRS, inventory is initially measured at cost (IAS 2.10), which is $300 in this case. No tax is mentioned in the transaction, so we do not add tax lines per the source-of-truth principle.
